textByHash.10aa8a2bf3866f95e6c574d5cfc7f67074cab653: You are going nowhere just yet sir.
textByHash.21c74d4e579f72a67d20ca110c4f8af460ace4e9: Well a most productive trip on all accounts! I will see you again...Very soon!
textByHash.2554d34e3332103da7e3df3bf3fb493f15f3c8a0: And that is your final answer Daquarius?
textByHash.40db5cec2603a3aba115549027a8051a7a6254ae: Now is that any way to talk to a fellow Zamorakian?
textByHash.42b5bbe854098c77de95a579cbe37f1ff0aa05d4: Oh... nothing much. I just thought you would like to know that I have returned as your new master.
textByHash.4d5247cd197fef586909bcfff71e7df52f5d483a: Ah... Such mistrust of your forgotten ally! Why did I ever leave these lands?
textByHash.51f619744d08eb625f38a68899ffe0b5b30f16e6: Well I am particularly interested in your brains at the moment! But you wouldn't want me taking those and leaving, now would you?
textByHash.61791ec6cc7d0997587024ad828c6792b4c3888b: You would threaten Solus Dellagar? Have you forgotten just who I am? Perhaps you need reminding!
textByHash.66c59d8aaec3e6bb093ff12d44ff3a0367fb9fd0: Well you ARE a persistent fellow aren't you?
textByHash.677661c57e95c6f6af01f8d381c517c14f3a9f38: With your most interesting research! No, I will be content with simply taking your money sir!
textByHash.677662cff625dabcebe6f4a956084f6b5b8c05d1: I am interested in your research!
textByHash.6b159c1d6df8d38e792f22f549774fcfa028a1c5: Little tricks, you say? Well how about this one!
textByHash.73cbe4e9c9397b79fe54e657d86f0fcfdfff4e1d: Ah! But he is not here, is he?
textByHash.7cf186efb6de63db1a2b0fa77c1f974e700d97cf: Still alive Daquarius? Good! I won't have to remind you of my power again next time! Make sure you are more prepared to follow orders next time I come to your little Taverley hideout!
textByHash.84f28e0991f8a094dd89d821e217ca0fd70dd622: Well, what have we here? A shrine to Zamorak in the middle of Varrock?
textByHash.933334917c7cf06fe570e49bac0530a7775df44a: Kill you? HAH HAH HAH! My dear fellow, if I wanted you dead, you ALREADY WOULD BE!
textByHash.95b52e1e88d4da2337a049ecd2f0802d83f85496: Little White Knight, I command powers beyond your imagination!
textByHash.a1559f021828e743477aa5331791d51229a508be: You... You meddlesome... You meddlesome freak!
textByHash.a2f277e0a849cc758b67a273d9b2dd181cce1f5d: I think it is time we end this once and for all!
textByHash.acb9a96a88c71b8f14365a65bf71d13f2183b916: Lord Daquarius! Still festering in your pathetic little dungeon, I see.
textByHash.b1fcf62795ec89f44cdd262d9714605814256d34: Well you ARE a persistent madam aren't you?
textByHash.b21eef3f07c4322a3f14dde49bbef67cf4763e93: Well you'll have to be quicker than that, my friend!
textByHash.c7f5f679c9e62b6a84cdb7e502ea9f2650830b85: I assume my reputation precedes me!
textByHash.d17f69172663c5dfad7bcadbd02861085fdecb6f: If you do not cease pursuing me, I will be forced to use them upon you!
textByHash.d582e74986af93a3a5de24e274307463c38ac7f1: Oh, we have a little magical skill do we?
textByHash.e192f3863e010b87595b16d1c6cb426887cfbae4: Or at least I would be if you weren't so laughably easy to escape from.
textByHash.e2db77863dcb75d9437039ce0ec1958bf506c99f: Well now, I am beginning to get sick of your constant interference!
textByHash.effb199728511d50d03d33d46008bc5d3819e594: Argh! I am so sick of your interference!
textByHash.f0f16fceefac904861d1b7fcb22480df0199f648: Then let's see how you deal with this!
textByHash.f2ca86b16e59d930e1b599e13170109002777ea2: Well well well! I was wondering when the White Knights would come looking for me!
textByHash.f8660da24bbf1f99ea87bf7a677c62ce37676445: I warn you, if you interfere with my plans I will see you suffer!
